name: pause-repeat-regression
description: ISSUE-006 guard. Calling decide() twice on DIFFERENT transcripts must not produce identical chains on most runs — variance via tiebreak RNG, cascade roll, and remaining-persona shuffle. If someone accidentally caches a decision, this flares.

input.transcript: First chunk: Jason is discussing a recent Series A raise of 20 million dollars.

secondInput.transcript: Second chunk: the next guest is complaining about hype-driven valuations and buzzwords.
